_source: gin7 manual pp.33-37,46 via logh7-manual-canon.md §5 (PDF-verified pp.33/34/35 = PDF idx 33/34/35)
_confidence_notes: Mechanics, the five ladder-ordering laws, personnel-authority tiers, promotion/demotion rules, and the two point systems are all verbatim from the manual and PDF-verified against gin7manual.pdf page-index 33/34/35.

Headcount caps (5.4) are from the manual digest table (p35); the cap numbers themselves were NOT re-read off the PDF table cells (the p35 PDF idx page rendered the authority table but not the cap table cells), so the six cap counts carry _uncertain on the count value only — the rank names are P1.

Full 14-rank ladder: the manual digest only names 元帥/上級大将/大将/中将/少将/准将 + '大佐以下'. The rank strings 大佐..曹長 are P1 shipped (org-posts.json 別表 min/max_rank_ja). The lowest enlisted ranks (軍曹/兵長 etc.) below 曹長 are NOT attested in the manual digest and are marked _uncertain; the ladder here lists the 13 manual-attested rank names. The '14 階級' count from the task spec is treated as approximate.
Fame-point COST of selecting an original character: manual states it is consumed (消費する, p34) but gives NO numeric amount — cost value marked _uncertain/null.
Flagship-change (5.7) is manual-stated as a provisional spec.
Alliance does NOT use 上級大将 (rank absent on alliance side per caps table).

Complements imperial-titles.json (peerage/作位) and org-posts.json (post capacity & min/max rank); does NOT duplicate them — this file holds the RANK ladder, caps, point systems, and promotion mechanics.

rankLadder._desc: 階級ラダー (rank ladder). Within a single rank, characters are always ordered by descending 功績 (merit). Military (軍人) and politician (政治家) maintain SEPARATE ladders. Higher rank = eligibility for higher posts (see org-posts.json min_rank_ja).

ranks._note: Alliance does not use this rank.
Lowest manual-attested rank (org-posts 士官学校教官 min_rank).

_unattestedLowerRanks.note: Task spec cites '14 階級'. Ranks below 曹長 (e.g. 軍曹/兵長/兵) are NOT enumerated in the manual digest; one additional enlisted tier likely exists to reach 14. Not included as data until attested.

ladderOrdering._desc: 階級ラダー内の順位 — five laws (p35). Recomputed whenever any character's 功績 changes. Applied in order; each law is a tiebreaker for the prior.
ladderOrdering.recalcTrigger: any character's 功績 (merit) point value changes

laws.rule_ja: 功績ポイントの多い順
爵位の高い順（銀河帝国軍のみ）
laws.rule_en: Higher 爵位 (noble title) first — Galactic Empire military ONLY.

laws._note: Decorations currently unimplemented in the revival — skip this law for now.

laws.rule_ja: 全パラメータ値の合計
laws.rule_en: Sum of all parameter values (highest first).

headcountCaps._desc: 階級ごとの定員 (per-rank headcount cap), p35. 大佐 and below are UNLIMITED. Caps differ slightly between factions because Alliance lacks 上級大将.
headcountCaps._capUncertaintyNote: Rank names P1; cap COUNT values from digest table only (not re-read off PDF table cells).

personnelAuthority._desc: 人事権 (personnel authority) by rank tier, p35/p36. The post listed holds the appoint/promote/demote authority over characters in that rank band. PDF-verified (idx 35).
personnelAuthority.selfRankChange: A character may request a change to their own rank via 提案 (proposal) — promotion/demotion is itself a personnel command.

tiers._note: Alliance 元帥-tier authority holder is extraction-uncertain in the digest.

tiers.empireAuthority_en: Military Affairs Ministry Personnel Bureau Director
tiers.allianceAuthority_en: National Defense Committee Personnel Bureau Director

promotionDemotion._desc: 昇進と降等 (promotion/demotion mechanics), p36. PDF-verified verbatim (idx 35).

promotion.command: 人事コマンド「昇進」 (personnel command 'Promote')
effects: Character is inserted at the BOTTOM (最下位) of the next-rank-up ladder.
Loses ALL 職務権限カード (post/authority cards) EXCEPT 個人 (personal) / 艦長 (captain) / 封土 (fief).

demotion.command: 人事コマンド「降等」 (personnel command 'Demote')
effects: Character is inserted at the BOTTOM (最下位) of the next-rank-down ladder.
Loses ALL 職務権限カード EXCEPT 個人 / 艦長 / 封土.

autoPromotionMonthly._desc: Real-time monthly auto-promotion (大佐以下 only), p34.
autoPromotionMonthly.rule: The #1-ranked character on each affected rank ladder is automatically promoted (no command input required).

auto30GameDayCheck._desc: In-game 30-day auto promote/demote check (大佐以下 only), p35.
auto30GameDayCheck.rule: Characters meeting promotion conditions are auto-promoted, and those violating retention conditions are auto-demoted — no command input required.
auto30GameDayCheck.autoPromotedMeritSeed: A character promoted by the auto-check (specifically) is granted the AVERAGE 功績 of characters already in the target ladder (instead of 0).

pointSystems._desc: The two point systems, p33-34,46. PDF-verified (idx 33/34).

evaluationPoints.scope: per-session (このセッション内におけるキャラクターの評価)

increaseSources.source_ja: 戦術ゲームで敵ユニット撃破 / 敵惑星・要塞占領
increaseSources.source_en: Tactical game: destroy an enemy unit OR occupy an enemy planet/fortress.

increaseSources.source_ja: 所属勢力がゲームに勝利（最終階級に応じて、要生存）
increaseSources.source_en: Faction wins the game — scaled by FINAL rank; character must be ALIVE.

increaseSources.source_ja: 准将以上は死亡時の階級に応じた固定値（陣営の勝敗無関係）
increaseSources.source_en: 准将 (Brigadier) and above: on death, a fixed value by rank-at-death is assigned, INDEPENDENT of win/loss.

tacticalTally._desc: p46: tactical achievement points are tallied every 30 in-game days, ranked, and converted into evaluation points by ranking.
tacticalTally.process: tally tactical achievement points -> rank characters -> convert to evaluation points by ranking position

famePoints.scope: persistent / player-level (継続的なゲーム全体に対するプレイヤーの評価)
famePoints.increase: At session end, the character's evaluation points are converted and ADDED to fame points.

decrease.trigger: Selecting an ORIGINAL character (オリジナルキャラクターを選択する場合) consumes fame points.
decrease._note: Manual states fame points are consumed but gives NO numeric cost. Cost value unknown from the manual.

flagshipChange._desc: 旗艦変更 (flagship change), p36-37. Provisional spec.
rules: A character's flagship TYPE is set at character creation, tied to their rank at that time.
On any rank change (promote/demote), the flagship is swapped for one matching the NEW rank.
flagshipChange._note: Marked provisional in the manual digest.

appointmentAuthority._desc: 任命と罷免 (appointment & dismissal), p37. Complements org-posts.json (which holds each post's capacity and min/max rank).
rules: Authority flows TOP-DOWN through the post hierarchy; a higher post holds both 任命 (appoint) and 罷免 (dismiss) over lower posts.
Every post except the apex is dismissable — even a post held by an original character.
Appointment validation: the target's rank must be WITHIN the post's allowed rank range (org-posts min_rank_ja..max_rank_ja) AND STRICTLY LOWER than the appointer's own rank.

serverImplementationNotes.status: NOT implemented in the revival server (gap). Data-drivable / rules-layer.
serverImplementationNotes.wireHooks: Character rank lives on the 0x0323 character record; 功績/評価/名声 are character-level scalars. Promotion/demotion/appoint/dismiss are 人事 (personnel) commands in the same group as the 0x070x personnel opcodes (see imperial-titles.json group 0x12).
serverImplementationNotes.caps: Per-rank caps gate promotion eligibility; respect existing content caps (logh7-content-caps.mjs).
